text_original:
My husband is away on service,
Not knowing the day of his return.
When the sheep and oxen come down from the hill,
How can I not think of him?
text_normalized:
My husband is away on service,
Not knowing the day of his return.
When the sheep and oxen come down from the hill,
How can I not think of him?

text_original:
My husband is away on service,
Not knowing the day of his return.
When the fowls roost in the evening,
How can I not think of him?
text_normalized:
My husband is away on service,
Not knowing the day of his return.
When the fowls roost in the evening,
How can I not think of him?
